steps.title: Convert 10% to division
steps.content: 10% of a number means one-tenth of that number. To find 10% of 370, we calculate $$\frac{370}{10}$$.

steps.title: Compute the division
steps.content: $$\frac{370}{10} = 37$$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. $10%$ of a quantity means $\frac{10}{100}$ times the quantity. Therefore, $10%$ of $370$ can be represented as $\frac{10}{100}\left(370\right)$, which is equivalent to $0.10\left(370\right)$, or $37$. Therefore, $10%$ of $370$ is $37$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is $10%$ of $270$, not $10%$ of $370$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is $90%$ of $370$, not $10%$ of $370$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is $370-10$, not $10%$ of $370$.
